profil.deskripsi_bisnis: Pt Wicaksana Overseas International Tbk engages in the distribution and trading of food, beverages, healthcare, and other products in Indonesia. It operates through two segments, Distribution and Trading Centre. The company offers food and beverages, cigarettes, body care and cosmetic products, and electrical and plastic materials. It also provides pharmaceuticals, over the counter and consumer health products, and medical devices, as well as commercial, regulatory, and distribution services. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. Pt Wicaksana Overseas International Tbk is a subsidiary of DKSH Holding AG
